creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ashish SHUKLA from comment #1)

If you can commit all three in one set, that would be very nice.  I imagine on VuXML entry for both should suffice, and then it's easier if everything is handled in one go.

Please reference this PR in the commit so I know when to push my updates depending on the new Go version.
